video:video.video:title: Onboarding & Termination - Lesson 5 - SOC 2 Policies

video:video.video:title: Team Formation - Lesson 2 - SOC 2 Policies
video:video.video:description: From Lesson 2 of the free SOC 2 course by strongDM - SOC 2 Team Formation.

video:video.video:title: How to Prepare for SOC 2 Type 1 and SOC 2 Type 2
video:video.video:description: The first time I went through SOC 2 I wasted way too many hours on Google trying to figure out best practices. It drove me nuts how much was written without actually telling me anything actionable. Why wasn’t there a simple summary to understand: - How long will a SOC 2 audit take? - How much will a SOC 2 audit cost? - What are the best practices for each SOC policy? Two years later, we decided to write our own and make it available for all and free to use. To learn how you can use our free, open-source resource for SOC 2 certification visit us at https://www.strongdm.com/comply We also have a Comply for SOC 2 Slack Channel, join the conversation at https://join.slack.com/t/comply-users/shared_invite/enQtMzU3MTk5MDkxNDU4LTBhY2Q0MzcxZWNlNzM2ZjAwYmZhNTlkNmY3ZjFlMzIwOWI5OTZjZjhmYjIxNzg1OWVmZTFlNWUzZmM2YjAwMjA
